What's new in Power Apps

Resources for new features recently released, features releasing in the next few months, and known limitations.

Weekly releases: See Released versions for Microsoft Power Apps
Release plan: See Release Planner (releaseplans.microsoft.com)

Monthly releases for model-driven apps:
- Semi-annual: Twice per year (default), rollout starts early April and early October
- Monthly: Once per month

Release channel options and monthly channel available.
Known limitations: Common issues and resolutions

Page last updated: 2025-05-07
Updated: 2026-04-12
